state_pressure.basis: June 10 session overlay — gap narrowing between SPX and 10Y; SPX below 1.0σ.

session_context: June 10 session overlay: neutral | stable; gap narrowing; medium confidence, fragile stability.

drafts.x:
10Y yield starting to stretch — one more move and the regime flips.
Needs confirmation from the rest of the board — that's when it gets real.

SPX 7,389. 10Y 4.52%. Oil $90.

Invalidation:
• SPX breaks above 7,500 or below 7,278
• 10Y moves beyond 4.72% or below 4.32%

What breaks this range — and which direction?
drafts.substack:
REGIME: Neutral | Diverging
CONFIDENCE: Medium (56/100)
RISK TILT: neutral
STABILITY: Fragile

Snapshot — Jun 10, 2026
  S&P 500:     7,389.14   z +0.81
  10Y Yield:      4.521%  z +1.19
  WTI Oil:        89.50   z -1.18

INSIGHT
S&P 500 at 7,389 is sitting near its 63-session mean — no signal from equities. 10Y yield at 4.52% is elevated relative to its rolling mean — starting to lean but not decisive. Oil at $90 is depressed relative to its rolling mean — starting to lean but not decisive. Confidence sits at 56/100 — enough for a directional lean but not a high-conviction call.

INVALIDATION
• SPX breaks above 7,500 or below 7,278
• 10Y moves beyond 4.72% or below 4.32%

Method: MacroEvidence pipeline · yfinance + FRED · 63-session rolling z-scores · not financial advice.

inv_rows.condition: SPX above 7,500 or below 7,278 → Regime flips

regime_analogs.intro: As of June 10, 2026, three closest structural matches for today’s neutral stable regime — gap narrowing, rates leading, SPX below 1.0σ. Members search the full 50-year database.

analog_rows.outcome: Gap narrowed then broke lower — SPX lost 7,278 equivalent within 3 sessions as rates held above 1.0σ and oil stayed suppressed
Gap resolved pro-risk — 10Y pulled back below 1.0σ within 4 sessions, SPX reclaimed 1.0σ and extended above 7,500 equivalent
Neutral resolved pro-risk — rates pulled back, SPX reclaimed 1.0σ, WTI remained suppressed and did not drive the resolution

regime_analogs.context_note: Structural pattern matches only — not predictions. Gap narrowing with SPX below 1.0σ and rates leading is the defining condition. Resolution at 7,500 and 4.72%. Historical context.
